workbookDisplayName.defaultValue: GOV - DNS as an Attack Vector

metadata.description: The display name of the workbook.
The unique ID for the workbook.
The name of the Log Analytics workspace.
The resource group of the Log Analytics workspace.
The subscription ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# 🌐 DNS as an Attack Vector
---
InfoBlox is an early warning system. Correlates DHCP IP assignments with DNS resolution activity. A device that resolves a suspicious domain and then makes an outbound firewall-allowed connection to that same IP is confirmed C2 communication — not just a DNS query."},"name":"title"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":86400000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":3600000},{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":259200000},{"durationMs":604800000}],"allowCustom":true},"label":"Time Range"}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 📋 InfoBlox DNS Activity"},"name":"dns-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor has_any ('Infoblox', 'InfoBlox', 'INFOBLOX')
| summarize
    TotalDNSEvents = count(),
    BlockedDomains = countif(DeviceAction in ('block', 'Block', 'deny', 'Deny')),
    UniqueSources = dcount(SourceIP)
| project TotalDNSEvents, BlockedDomains, UniqueSources","size":4,"title":"InfoBlox DNS summary","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"tiles","tileSettings":{"showBorder":true,"titleContent":{"columnMatch":"","formatter":1},"leftContent":{"columnMatch":"TotalDNSEvents","formatter":12,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue"}}}},"customWidth":"100","name":"kpi-dns"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor has_any ('Infoblox', 'InfoBlox', 'INFOBLOX')
| where DeviceAction in ('block', 'Block', 'deny', 'Deny')
| summarize BlockCount = count() by DestinationHostName
| where isnotempty(DestinationHostName)
| sort by BlockCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Top blocked DNS domains","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"BlockCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":500}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-blocked-dns"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor has_any ('Infoblox', 'InfoBlox', 'INFOBLOX')
| where isnotempty(SourceIP)
| summarize QueryCount = count() by SourceIP
| sort by QueryCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Most active DNS clients","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"QueryCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue","max":10000}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-dns-clients"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔴 DNS Resolution → Firewall Connection (C2 Confirmation)"},"name":"c2-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let DNSResolutions = CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor has_any ('Infoblox', 'InfoBlox', 'INFOBLOX')
| where isnotempty(SourceIP) and isnotempty(DestinationHostName)
| where DestinationHostName has_any ('.onion', '.bit', '.cc', '.ru', '.cn', '.tk', '.pw', '.xyz', '.top', 'ngrok', 'ddns', 'duckdns', 'no-ip')
| summarize DNSQueryCount = count(), Domains = make_set(DestinationHostName, 5) by ClientIP = SourceIP;
let FWConnections = CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor in ('Fortinet', 'Palo Alto Networks', 'Cisco', 'Juniper')
| where DeviceAction in ('allow', 'Allow', 'permit', 'Permit', 'accept', 'Accept')
| where isnotempty(SourceIP)
| summarize ConnectionCount = count() by SourceIP, DestinationIP;
DNSResolutions
| join kind=inner (FWConnections | project ClientIP = SourceIP, DestinationIP, ConnectionCount) on ClientIP
| project ClientIP, DNSQueryCount, Domains, DestinationIP, ConnectionCount
| sort by DNSQueryCount desc","size":0,"title":"Clients that queried suspicious DNS domains AND made firewall-allowed outbound connections — C2 candidates","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"DNSQueryCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":100}},{"columnMatch":"ConnectionCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":100}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-dns-c2"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 📊 DNS Anomalies"},"name":"dns-anomaly-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"CommonSecurityLog
| where DeviceVendor has_any ('Infoblox', 'InfoBlox', 'INFOBLOX')
| where isnotempty(SourceIP)
| summarize QueryCount = count() by SourceIP, bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| where QueryCount > 500
| sort by QueryCount desc","size":0,"title":"DNS query volume spikes — >500 queries per hour from one source","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"QueryCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":5000}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-dns-spikes"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"Syslog
| where ProcessName has_any ('named', 'unbound', 'bind', 'dnsmasq')
| where SyslogMessage has_any ('NXDOMAIN', 'SERVFAIL', 'refused', 'query failed', 'lame server')
| summarize ErrorCount = count() by HostName, SeverityLevel
| sort by ErrorCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"DNS server errors (NXDOMAIN / SERVFAIL spikes)","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ErrorCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":500}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-dns-errors"}],"styleSettings":{},"$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
